services.title: Social Media Editing
services.short: Short-form edits built to stop the scroll without losing the soul of the story.
services.detail: Polished reels, TikToks, shorts, captions, pacing, and content polish for brands with footage that needs a stronger finish.
services.ideal: Brands with existing footage or recurring content needs.

services.title: Brand Videography
services.short: On-location filming that captures your brand with warmth and intention.
services.detail: Cinematic brand films, launch assets, founder-led content, product moments, and behind-the-scenes storytelling.
services.ideal: Boutiques, hospitality brands, studios, and service-led businesses.

services.title: Monthly Packages
services.short: Consistent, high-quality content so you always have something to post.
services.detail: A steady production rhythm with planning, filming, editing, and delivery designed around your calendar.
services.ideal: Businesses that want consistency without managing every detail.

services.title: Creative Direction
services.short: A clearer visual point of view before the camera ever comes out.
services.detail: Campaign concepts, shot direction, moodboards, content pillars, and creative planning for specific launches or seasons.
services.ideal: Teams who know they need content, but need the idea sharpened first.

services.title: Event Coverage
services.short: Editorial coverage for moments worth remembering and repurposing.
services.detail: Warm, observant filming for retreats, launches, brand activations, openings, and intimate gatherings.
services.ideal: Brands hosting thoughtful experiences or customer-facing moments.

services.title: Strategy Support
services.short: Guidance on what to post, how to say it, and what actually works.
services.detail: Practical content support for offers, posting cadence, hooks, content themes, and campaign planning.
services.ideal: Owners who want clearer content without sounding over-produced.
